# 🚨 Repository Archived 🚨

The repository **[divyanshudhruv/once-ui-tailwind-starter](https://github.com/divyanshudhruv/once-ui-tailwind-starter)** is no longer maintained.

We've moved to our new, improved template with better features, updated UI, and active support.

## 📦 Try the New Template &nbsp; [![Star the new template](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/basalt3/spojt.svg?style=social&label=Star)](https://github.com/basalt3/spojt)

[Get started with the new template here](https://github.com/basalt3/spojt)
